title: Excel AI Formula Generator
description: Convert natural language instructions into Excel formulas using AI. Simply describe what you want to calculate, and this formula generates the appropriate Excel syntax.
formulaCode:
=AI_FORMULA(input, context_column_range)

Example usage:
=AI_FORMULA("Sum all sales for Q1 where region is North", B2:F100)

Result: SUM(FILTER(B2:F100, (MONTH(A2:A100)<=3)*(C2:C100="North")))

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Natural language description of what you want to calculate

parameters.name: context_column_range
parameters.description: Range containing potentially relevant data columns

title: Multi-Objective Optimization Solver
description: Advanced optimization engine that finds the best solution across multiple conflicting objectives. Perfect for resource allocation, scheduling, and investment decisions.
formulaCode:
=MULTI_OPTIMIZE(objectives, constraints, variable_range)

Example usage for Portfolio Optimization:
Objective 1: Maximize returns: SUMPRODUCT(weights, expected_returns)
Objective 2: Minimize risk: MMULT(TRANSPOSE(weights), covariance_matrix, weights)

=MULTI_OPTIMIZE(
  A1:B2, // Objectives: [Max_Returns, Min_Risk]
  A4:B6, // Constraints: [Total_Weights=100%, Min_Allocation_per_Asset>0]
  C1:C10  // Variable cells: weights
)

parameters.name: objectives
parameters.description: Range defining optimization objectives [direction, formula]

parameters.name: constraints
parameters.description: Range defining constraints [relationship, formula, rhs_value]

parameters.name: variable_range
parameters.description: Cells to optimize (will be modified by solver)

title: Comprehensive Retirement Planning Dashboard
description: All-in-one retirement calculator with Monte Carlo simulation, inflation adjustment, and dynamic withdrawal strategies. Accounts for market volatility and provides probability-based projections.
formulaCode:
=RETIREMENT_PLAN(age, retirement_age, current_savings, annual_contribution, expected_return, inflation_rate, withdrawal_rate, scenarios)

// Monte Carlo simulation for retirement planning
=RETIREMENT_PLAN(
  A1, // Current age: 30
  B1, // Retirement age: 65
  C1, // Current savings: $100,000
  D1, // Annual contribution: $15,000
  E1, // Expected return: 7%
  F1, // Inflation rate: 3%
  G1, // Withdrawal rate: 4%
  H1  // Monte Carlo scenarios: 10,000
)

// Returns: [Success Rate %, Median Retirement Balance, Worst Case, Best Case]

parameters.name: age
parameters.description: Current age

parameters.name: retirement_age
parameters.description: Target retirement age

parameters.name: current_savings
parameters.description: Current retirement savings amount

parameters.name: annual_contribution
parameters.description: Annual contribution to retirement savings

parameters.name: withdrawal_rate
parameters.description: Percentage to withdraw annually in retirement

title: Intelligent Data Cleaning Automation
description: Automatically detect and fix common data quality issues including duplicates, typos, missing values, and outliers. Uses machine learning to understand data patterns.

parameters.name: data_range
parameters.description: Range containing data to clean

parameters.name: algorithm_type
parameters.description: Type of cleaning algorithm (duplicate_detection, missing_value_imputation, outlier_removal, full_cleanup)

parameters.name: confidence_threshold
parameters.description: Confidence level for data corrections (0.8-0.99)

title: Advanced Statistical Trend Analysis Toolkit
description: Comprehensive trend analysis with automatic best-fit algorithm selection. Identifies seasonal patterns, outliers, and provides confidence intervals and prediction bounds.

parameters.name: data_series
parameters.description: Time series data (can include dates in first column)

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Analysis mode: auto_detect, linear, polynomial, exponential, seasonal, multivariate

parameters.name: significance_level
parameters.description: Statistical significance level for confidence intervals

title: AI-Powered Inventory Demand Forecasting
description: Machine learning model for demand forecasting that combines historical sales, seasonality, promotions, and external factors. Reduces stockouts and excess inventory.

parameters.name: historical_data
parameters.description: Historical sales data with columns for date, product, quantity sold

parameters.name: forecast_periods
parameters.description: Number of future periods to forecast

parameters.name: algorithm
parameters.description: Forecasting algorithm: ml_ensemble, sarima, prophet, automated_ml

parameters.name: external_factors
parameters.description: External influencing factors (weather, promotions, events, etc.)

title: Email Marketing Campaign Performance Optimizer
description: AI tool for predicting and optimizing email campaign performance. Analyzes subject lines, content, timing, and demographics to maximize open rates and conversions.

parameters.name: subject_line
parameters.description: Email subject line to test

parameters.name: audience_list
parameters.description: Subscriber data with demographics, preferences, history

parameters.name: optimization_goal
parameters.description: Objective: max_open_rate, max_conversions, max_clicks, min_unsubscribe

parameters.name: send_time_options
parameters.description: Available sending time slots

title: AI-Based Project Milestone Calculator
description: Intelligent project management tool that analyzes task dependencies, team capacity, and historical performance to automatically generate realistic project timelines.

parameters.name: tasks_desc
parameters.description: Project description and scope

parameters.name: dependencies
parameters.description: Task dependency relationships

parameters.name: team_data
parameters.description: Team member details, roles, availability

parameters.name: risk_tolerance
parameters.description: Buffer percentage (0-0.5) for risk

title: Real-Time Business KPI Dashboard Generator
description: Automatically selects and tracks the most relevant KPIs for your business based on your data. Provides real-time updates, anomaly detection, and predictive insights with beautiful visualizations.

parameters.name: data_sources
parameters.description: Data source(s) to analyze for KPIs

parameters.name: kpi_preferences
parameters.description: Types of KPIs to focus on (revenue, growth, efficiency, quality)

parameters.name: alerts
parameters.description: Alert conditions for threshold monitoring

parameters.name: visualization_style
parameters.description: Dashboard visual style (minimalist, colorful, corporate, modern)
